name: condensed-anima-qc

description: Condensed ANIMA on quantum-classical and classical-quantum networks. All skill compositions materialized as s-expressions across the polyglot substrate.
description_zh: 该技能提出了一个使用S表达式作为通用中间件来模拟量子-经典网络转换的概念框架。它定义了量子态和经典态之间的边界，包含测量和制备操作，并在多种Lisp方言中实现。文档高度抽象，缺乏实际使用或与真实量子硬件集成的具体示例。
_original_description: This skill presents a conceptual framework for modeling quantum-classical network transitions using s-expressions as a universal intermediate. It defines a boundary between quantum and classical states with measurement and preparation operations, implemented across multiple Lisp dialects. The documentation is highly abstract and lacks concrete examples of actual usage or integration with real quantum hardware.

description: Extract information delta between Claude.ai conversation exports using ACSets morphisms and bisimulation verification
description_zh: 该技能通过比较ID和节点状态，提取Claude.ai对话导出文件之间的差异。它能识别新对话并使用互模拟验证检测现有对话的变化。工具提供shell脚本和Clojure代码进行增量分析，并集成到Justfile工作流中。
_original_description: This skill extracts differences between Claude.ai conversation exports by comparing IDs and node states. It identifies new conversations and detects changes in existing ones using bisimulation verification. The tool provides shell scripts and Clojure code for delta analysis with integration into a Justfile workflow.

name: drive-acset
author: plurigrid
description: Google Drive management via DriveACSet schema with GF(3) triadic routing. Transforms files/folders into typed Interactions, routes to queue fibers, detects saturation for organized-drive-as-condensed-state.
description_zh: 将Google Drive文件系统建模为ACSet代数数据库的技能，使用GF(3)三元路由对操作分类，检测文件夹达到权限稳定、GF(3)平衡的'凝聚状态'。
_original_description: A Google Drive management skill that models files and folders as an ACSet database with GF(3) triadic routing. It organizes Drive operations into MINUS/ERGODIC/PLUS categories and detects when folders reach a 'condensed state' with stable permissions and balanced GF(3) cycles.
